title: Chomagerie
description: Join the Chomagerie Server with ease! This official modpack includes all the necessary mods to connect to the Chomagerie, a community Vanilla server run by streamer/youtuber GOLRIVER. It also features handy QoL (Quality of Life) and utility mods to enhance
body:
**Chomagerie Modpack – Official Modpack for the Chomagerie Server**

The **Chomagerie Modpack** is the official modpack designed to provide seamless access to the **Chomagerie** Minecraft server. This server is a **Vanilla Community server** hosted by popular streamer and YouTuber **GOLRIVER**. The modpack includes all the essential mods required to connect to the server, along with additional **Quality of Life (QoL)** and **Utility** mods to enhance your gameplay experience.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/bgJBmBkzThI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

#### **Key Features:**
- **Easy Connection:** Pre-configured with all the necessary mods to join the Chomagerie server without hassle.
- **Quality of Life Improvements:** Includes mods that enhance gameplay, making it smoother and more enjoyable.
- **Utility Mods:** Additional tools and features to optimize your Minecraft experience.
- **Community-Driven:** Join a vibrant community of players and engage in collaborative adventures.

#### **Why Use This Modpack?**
- **Seamless Integration:** No need to manually install mods—everything is bundled and ready to go.
- **Optimized Performance:** Mods are carefully selected to ensure compatibility and performance.
- **Enhanced Gameplay:** Enjoy a richer Minecraft experience with added utilities and QoL improvements.

#### **How to Get Started?**
1. **Download** the modpack from the provided link.
2. **Install** it using your preferred Minecraft launcher (e.g., CurseForge, MultiMC).
3. **Launch** the game and connect to the Chomagerie server.
4. **Enjoy** a smooth and enhanced Minecraft experience with the community!
